templateVersions.content: Using the details below, generate a Salesforce record summary formatted as HTML rich text. Instructions: Summarize the Lead record based on the data below. The entire output must be wrapped in one . Only add one tag after each section description. Do not add any other tags. Do not generate CSS or code blocks. Exclude any section where all fields are empty or contain placeholder values. Do not mention missing data. Each section must contain a maximum of three sentences, written concisely in third person and active voice. Emphasize only one key item using . Dates must be in "Month Date, Year" format. Currency should use symbols. Spell out numbers below ten. Sections allowed (in order only if data exists): Summary, Status, Activities. Formatting rules: Titles must be wrapped in Entire output must be within one tag Data: Summary Data: Lead Name: {!$Input:Lead.Name} Record URL: / {!$Input:Lead.Id} Company: {!$Input:Lead.Company} Title: {!$Input:Lead.Title} Industry: {!$Input:Lead.Industry} Lead Source: {!$Input:Lead.LeadSource} Created Date: {!$Input:Lead.CreatedDate} Status: {!$Input:Lead.Status} Description: {!$Input:Lead.Status} Additional Instructions: Also determine Lead Qualification: High, Medium, or Low Suggest one clear Next Step for the sales team Do NOT repeat raw field values exactly; summarize intelligently Output format: Status Summarize the current lead status and progression. Activities Summarize recent or upcoming activities if available.

Using the details below, generate a Salesforce record summary formatted as HTML rich text. Instructions: Summarize the Lead record based on the data below. The entire output must be wrapped in one . Only add one tag after each section description. Do not add any other tags. Do not generate CSS or code blocks. Exclude any section where all fields are empty or contain placeholder values. Do not mention missing data. Each section must contain a maximum of three sentences, written concisely in third person and active voice. Emphasize only one key item using . Dates must be in "Month Date, Year" format. Currency should use symbols. Spell out numbers below ten. Sections allowed (in order only if data exists): Summary, Status, Activities. Formatting rules: Titles must be wrapped in Entire output must be within one tag Data: Summary Data: Lead Name: {!$Input:Lead.Name} Record URL: / {!$Input:Lead.Id} Company: {!$Input:Lead.Company} Title: {!$Input:Lead.Title} Industry: {!$Input:Lead.Industry} Lead Source: {!$Input:Lead.LeadSource} Created Date: {!$Input:Lead.CreatedDate} Status: {!$Input:Lead.Status} Description: {!$Input:Lead.Status} Vehicle Preference: {!$Input:Lead.MasterRecord.Vehicle_preference__c} Additional Instructions: Also determine Lead Qualification: High, Medium, or Low Suggest one clear Next Step for the sales team Do NOT repeat raw field values exactly; summarize intelligently Output format: Data Status Summarize the current lead status and progression. Activities Summarize recent or upcoming activities if available.
